requestedDecision: Design discussion for #25 (ADR 0001 producer provenance). Freeze five owner-reserved decisions the ADR left open: (1) exact file list + normalization rules for a deterministic complete-plugin archive (candidates: .claude-plugin/, agents/, bin/, dist/rigor.cjs, hooks/, skills/, README.md, LICENSE) so two builds byte-match; (2) detached release-manifest schema (fields, digests, source/tag/workflow binding) published beside the archive, never self-referential; (3) consumer verification: gh attestation verify flags plus which cert-extension values (numeric repo id 1296432215, trigger event, tag pattern) must be checked from JSON since flags don't enforce them, verifier/gh version pinning, trusted-root refresh cadence, max offline age, denylist distribution; (4) whether to recommend enabling GitHub immutable releases (separately authorized) or pin commit+digests treating tags as mutable; (5) a safe authorized non-production attestation smoke-test approach that proves the path without a real release. Separate facts, options, recommendation, uncertainty, and human decisions. Read-only.
requiredActions: Package an explicit 21-file allowlist (.claude-plugin/{marketplace,plugin}.json, agents/rigor-reviewer.md, bin/rigor, dist/rigor.cjs, hooks/hooks.json, skills/*/SKILL.md, LICENSE, README.md, README.ja.md) under rigor-X.Y.Z/, dirs 0755, bin/rigor 0755, others 0644, sorted, mtime 0, uid/gid 0, ustar, gzip without timestamp; reject symlinks/extra/missing/mode-mismatch; exclude src/test/docs/schemas/scripts/node_modules/.git/.github/.rigor/package*.json.

Emit detached rigor-X.Y.Z.release-manifest.json (canonical JSON, sorted keys, additionalProperties false) with schemaVersion, release.tag/version, source.repository/repositoryId(1296432215)/commit/ref, workflow.path/ref/digest, subjects.bundle+pluginArchive sha256, tools.node/esbuild, and an explicit trustAnchor note that the manifest is metadata not proof. Never self-referential; attest the manifest as a third subject.

Fail-closed consumer verifier calling gh attestation verify with --repo --signer-workflow --signer-digest --source-digest --source-ref --cert-oidc-issuer --deny-self-hosted-runners --predicate-type --format json; then enforce cert-extension values not covered by flags (repo id OID 1.3.6.1.4.1.57264.1.14=1296432215, trigger event=push, source ref matching ^refs/tags/v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$, GitHub-hosted runner) from JSON; pin gh version, refresh roots<=7d, offline<=30d, external denylist. Test logic against captured/synthetic fixtures offline.
Immutable releases: choose option (a) - document enabling as a separately authorized owner action while consumer policy treats every tag as mutable and pins commit+digests; do NOT enable in #25.

Smoke test in a SEPARATE workflow (provenance-smoke.yml), workflow_dispatch only, protected environment with owner approval, canonical repo id only, branch ref only (reject main and all tags), GitHub-hosted, least privilege (contents:read,id-token:write,attestations:write), actions pinned to full SHAs, synthetic subject only (never dist/rigor.cjs or the archive), no tag/release/asset creation. Never add workflow_dispatch/pull_request_target/workflow_call to the production signer workflow. Validate tag with strict regex before attesting so fork PRs cannot mint trusted provenance.
